mapper.select: /* 한전 요금 수익 조회 */ select site_id, bill_yearm, sum(base_rate) as base_rate, sum(consume_rate) as consume_rate, sum(pwr_factor_rate) as pwr_factor_rate, sum(tot_elec_rate) as tot_elec_rate, sum(elec_fund) as elec_fund, sum(val_add_tax) as val_add_tax, sum(tot_amt_bill) as tot_amt_bill from ( select bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, reg_date from tb_bill where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } ) a group by site_id, bill_yearm order by bill_yearm
